title: Media and Young Minds
author: American Academy of Pediatrics, Council on Communications and Media
summary_for_internal_use: AAP policy statement on screen media and children under 5; basis for guidance limiting screen time for young children.

title: Guidelines on physical activity, sedentary behaviour and sleep for children under 5 years of age
author: World Health Organization
summary_for_internal_use: WHO recommends no sedentary screen time for children under 1, and no more than one hour for children under 5.

title: Sweden's plan to bring books back to schools
author: Reuters / various reporting on Swedish Ministry of Education statements
summary_for_internal_use: Coverage of Sweden's 2023 policy reversal de-emphasizing tablets in early grades and restoring printed books and handwriting.

title: Spying on Students: GoGuardian and the Surveillance State
author: Electronic Frontier Foundation
summary_for_internal_use: EFF reporting on classroom monitoring software, including documented over-flagging of LGBTQ+ search terms and First Amendment concerns.

title: Online and Observed: Student Privacy Implications of School-Issued Devices and Student Activity Monitoring Software
author: Center for Democracy and Technology
summary_for_internal_use: Survey of teachers, parents, and students on monitoring software and student-issued devices.

title: Education Law §2-d and Part 121 Regulations
author: New York State Education Department
summary_for_internal_use: NYSED's implementing regulation page for §2-d, including required content of Parents Bill of Rights.

title: Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act (FERPA)
author: U.S. Department of Education, Family Policy Compliance Office
summary_for_internal_use: Primary federal source on FERPA rights.

title: Children's Online Privacy Protection Rule (COPPA)
author: U.S. Federal Trade Commission
summary_for_internal_use: FTC guidance on COPPA, including school-consent provisions.

title: New York Freedom of Information Law (Public Officers Law Article 6)
author: New York State Committee on Open Government
summary_for_internal_use: Primary source on FOIL procedures, response timelines, and appeal rights.
